# Faith Driven Singapore — Full Context

> Faith Driven Singapore is the local Singapore chapter of the global Faith Driven Entrepreneur movement — a growing community of Christ-following founders and business builders who gather monthly, online and in person, to worship, learn, and grow together. No cost. No catch. Website: https://faithdriven.sg

## Mission

Faith Driven Singapore exists to help Christ-following entrepreneurs find their community and fulfil their God-given call to create. God gave people ideas, dreams and ventures to reflect His image. Faith-driven ventures bring order out of chaos, solve problems, and create dignity. No one was meant to build alone — and in Singapore, they don't have to.

## Why the community exists

Of an estimated 582 million entrepreneurs worldwide, around 180 million are Christ-following, yet only a fraction have access to a community that connects their faith with their work — meaning the overwhelming majority are building alone. Faith Driven Singapore is changing that, one gathering, one founder, one story at a time.

## What Faith Driven Singapore offers

1. Community — Join a Foundations Group: 10 to 15 entrepreneurs, eight weeks, online or in person.
2. Content — Watch founder stories on YouTube and listen to the weekly podcast.
3. Gatherings — Monthly meetings across Singapore; past venues include Browzwear, City Harvest, Endowus, Nautique and Block71.
4. The Book — The free Faith Driven Entrepreneur book and video series.

## Gatherings

Gatherings happen monthly, both online and in person, across Singapore. Each gathering includes worship, a founder's story, and honest conversation with people who understand the entrepreneurial journey. Everyone is welcome — whether just starting out or scaling up — and you do not need to come with a group. Recorded sessions from Singapore gatherings are published on YouTube, including an eight-session journey through the Marks of a Faith Driven Entrepreneur (topics such as "Our Call to Create," "God Owns My Business," "Don't Worship Work," "Excellence Matters," "Faithful vs. Willful," "Ministry in Word," "Ministry in Deed," and "Global Movement").

## The Foundation Course / Foundations Groups

The Foundation Course is the flagship eight-session (eight-week) video series featuring J.D. Greear and Henry Kaestner. Groups of 10–15 entrepreneurs go through it together, online or in person. It is free — no cost, no catch.

## Resources

- The Faith Driven Entrepreneur book (free): a better way to build, where faith informs real business decisions. Includes a video series, discussion guide and community access. https://faithdrivenentrepreneur.org/books/
- The Foundation Course: https://faithdrivenentrepreneur.org/foundation-course/
- The Podcast: weekly conversations for the faithful disruptors called to create. https://faithdrivenentrepreneur.org/podcast/
- YouTube channel: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCy0L7vhcU5iSuap8kEmpHlA

## How to join or get in touch

- Get in touch on WhatsApp: https://wa.me/6591227009
- WhatsApp community group: https://chat.whatsapp.com/EJtCAix4JwJDM1nmpd4XhM
- Register with Faith Driven Entrepreneur: https://share.somin.ai/fde
- Next gathering (Eventbrite): https://share.somin.ai/event-fde

## Support / giving

Faith Driven Singapore is sustained by volunteers and monthly partners. Monthly giving is available from S$10, S$30, S$50 and S$100 per month, funding the food, venue and essentials needed to host Singapore's largest ongoing community of Faith Driven Entrepreneurs. One-time gifts and local bank transfers are welcome via WhatsApp. Monthly partner links: S$10 https://share.somin.ai/fde-10 · S$30 https://share.somin.ai/fde-30 · S$50 https://share.somin.ai/fde-50 · S$100 https://share.somin.ai/fde-100

## Frequently asked questions

Q: What is Faith Driven Singapore?
A: It is the local Singapore chapter of the global Faith Driven Entrepreneur movement — a growing community of Christ-following founders and business builders who gather to worship, learn, and grow together. It is free to be part of.

Q: Who is it for — can I join?
A: It is for Christ-following entrepreneurs, founders, and builders in Singapore — whether just starting out or scaling up. Everyone is welcome, and you do not need to come with a group.

Q: How much does it cost?
A: Nothing. No cost, no catch. Gatherings and Foundations Groups are free; the community is sustained by volunteers and monthly partners.

Q: What happens at a gathering?
A: Worship, a founder's story, and honest conversation with people who understand the journey. Gatherings happen monthly across Singapore, both online and in person.

Q: What is a Foundations Group?
A: An eight-week journey with 10–15 entrepreneurs through the Marks of a Faith Driven Entrepreneur, using the video series featuring J.D. Greear and Henry Kaestner. You can join online or in person.

Q: How do I get started?
A: Message the team on WhatsApp, join the WhatsApp community group, register with Faith Driven Entrepreneur, or come to the next gathering. All links are on https://faithdriven.sg

## Languages

The website is fully available in English, Chinese (中文, Simplified), Malay (Bahasa Melayu) and Tamil (தமிழ்) — Singapore's official languages.

## About the global movement

Faith Driven Entrepreneur is a global organisation helping Christ-following entrepreneurs find their community and fulfil their God-given call to create. Faith Driven Singapore is its local Singapore chapter. Global site: https://faithdrivenentrepreneur.org/
